description: You are a building energy manager commissioning a net-zero energy tracking system at http://localhost (admin/admin). The building has rooftop solar panels and a bi-directional grid connection meter. The grid_meter input (node building) reports signed power in Watts: positive values mean grid import, negative values mean grid export. The solar_pv input reports inverter output, but the installed CT clamp has a known 2x under-reading error — all solar readings must be scaled by a factor of 2.0. On solar_pv, apply the 2.0 correction factor, log corrected power to a new feed solar_power (PHPFina, 10s interval), and add Power-to-kWh accumulation logging to a new feed solar_energy_kwh. On grid_meter, build a branching pipeline that splits the signed power into two separate paths — log only the positive values (import) to grid_import_power and only the absolute value of negative readings (export) to grid_export_power (both PHPFina, 10s). Add Power-to-kWh accumulation for each, logging to grid_import_kwh and grid_export_kwh. Create a dashboard named Net Zero Tracker with at least 5 widgets: solar power dial (0-20kW), grid import power dial (0-50kW), grid export power value display, cumulative solar energy kWh, and cumulative grid import kWh.
